---
template-partials:
  - content/partials/title_only/title-block.html
page-layout: full
resources:
    - "images/banner.png"
    - "images/banner_dark.png"
    - "images/group/group_photo_spring2025.jpg"
toc: false
listing:
  date-format: short
  page-size: 10
  # feed: true
  filter-ui: false
  type: table
  sort-ui: false
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [Date, News]
  id: news-list
  contents: content/news.yaml
---

::: {.img-toggle}

:::

## The Data-Driven Renewables Research Group

The Data-Driven Renewables Research (D2R2 - Disney, please don't sue) Group led by Dr. Peter Schindler is seeking to
discover novel materials for renewable energy applications using high-throughput quantum chemistry calculations
and data-driven materials property predictions.

![](../images/group/group_photo_spring2025.jpg){width=80% fig-align="center"}

```{=html}
<center>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm", href="fun/" rel="noopener noreferrer">
  More Photos
</a> from our Groups' Social Gatherings, Conference Attendances, and Awards.
</center>
```

## Recent News and Events

```{=html}
<style>
#quarto-margin-sidebar {
  display: none !important;
}
.quarto-listing-category.category-default {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: row;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  padding: 0;
  background: none;
  border: none;
}
.quarto-listing-category .category {
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem;
  border: 1px solid #751ED7;
  border-radius: 0;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
  color: #751ED7;
  background-color: transparent;
  font-weight: normal;
  transition: background-color 0.15s, color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
}
.quarto-listing-category .category:hover,
.quarto-listing-category .category.active {
  background-color: #751ED7;
  color: #fff !important;
  border-color: #751ED7;
  font-weight: normal !important;
}
</style>
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  var categoryDiv = document.querySelector('#quarto-margin-sidebar .quarto-listing-category');
  var listingEl = document.getElementById('listing-news-list');
  if (categoryDiv && listingEl) {
    listingEl.parentNode.insertBefore(categoryDiv, listingEl);
  }
  var allBtn = document.querySelector('.quarto-listing-category .category[data-category=""]');
  if (allBtn) allBtn.classList.add('active');
});
</script>
```

::: {#news-list}
:::
